name: salesforce
title: QuickForce
description: Keyboard-driven Salesforce toolkit for developers and admins: switch orgs instantly, run SOQL queries, jump to any Setup page, and manage users, all from Raycast.
author: kelant

commands.name: run-soql
commands.title: Run SOQL Query
commands.description: Execute SOQL queries against your Salesforce org

commands.name: search-records
commands.title: Search Records
commands.description: Search across Salesforce objects (Accounts, Contacts, Opportunities, Leads, Cases)

commands.name: user-lookup
commands.title: Manage Users
commands.description: Search and manage Salesforce users with quick admin actions

commands.name: setup-quick-links
commands.title: Setup Quick Access
commands.description: Search and open Salesforce Setup pages instantly

commands.name: quick-record-creator
commands.title: Create Record
commands.description: Create common Salesforce records with minimal fields

commands.name: menu-bar-limits
commands.title: Org Limits in Menu Bar
commands.description: Show your default org's API and storage limits in the menu bar (enable when needed)

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
